channel.title: Major Digest - Reliable and Comprehensive News Sources: sports
channel.description: Get the latest news online at Major Digest, the top online news resource for the most reliable news sources. Stay informed about the world around you!

image.title: Major Digest - Reliable and Comprehensive News Sources: sports

item.title: Durant: Suns 'embarrassed ourselves' in humiliating 116-98 home loss to the Timberwolves
item.description: PHOENIX (AP) — A brutal season for the Phoenix Suns hit a low Sunday night with a humiliating 116-98 home loss to the Minnesota Timberwolves. “We didn't play up to our standards at all,” All-Star forward Kevin Durant said. “We embarrassed the fans and we embarrassed ourselves the way we played.
item.dc:creator: DAVID BRANDT, Associated Press, KGET 17, NBC

item.title: Luka scores 29 points and LeBron adds 17 in the Lakers' 2nd straight win over the Clippers, 108-102
item.description: LOS ANGELES (AP) — Luka Doncic had 29 points and nine assists, LeBron James added 17 points and the Los Angeles Lakers hung on to beat the Los Angeles Clippers for the second time in three days, 108-102 on Sunday night.
item.dc:creator: GREG BEACHAM, Associated Press, PHL 17

item.title: CIF NorCal basketball 2025: The matchups are set. Here’s what to know
item.description: Riordan gets the No. 1 overall seed in the Open. Can the Crusaders get to a state title game? Mitty girls vying for fifth consecutive NorCal title.
item.dc:creator: Nathan Canilao, Joseph Dycus, The Mercury News

item.title: CIF official addresses questions about 2025 state basketball tournament
item.description: NorCal basketball playoffs: Why does the NorCal Open Division boys bracket have just five teams? Was Pinewood given the short end of the stick in girls open? How Dougherty Valley boys went from NCS D1 champs to a top-6 seed in the NorCal D1.
item.dc:creator: Nathan Canilao, The Mercury News

item.title: Bell makes late charge for lead and holds off Byron at COTA for 2nd straight NASCAR victory
item.description: AUSTIN, Texas (AP) — Christopher Bell is making the most of his late-race chances to seize victories. Bell passed Kyle Busch with five laps to go, then held off Daytona 500 winner William Byron to win NASCAR’s first road course race of the season Sunday at the Circuit of the Americas.
item.dc:creator: JIM VERTUNO, Associated Press, PHL 17

item.title: Stanford women keep up hot play against Georgia Tech, cling to NCAA tournament hopes
item.description: The Cardinal will enter the ACC tournament having won five of six games, including Sunday's 87-82 win over Georgia Tech at Maples Pavilion.
item.dc:creator: Harold Gutmann, The Mercury News

item.title: Riley Gaines leads pre-race prayer before NASCAR Cup Series race in Texas
item.description: Riley Gaines, a champion of fairness in women's sports, gave the pre-race invocation at the Circuit of the Americas in Austin, Texas, on Sunday.
item.dc:creator: Fox News

item.title: Bulls guard, Chicago native Ayo Dosunmu to have shoulder surgery, out for season, team announces
item.description: CHICAGO — The 2024-25 season is over for Bulls guard and Chicago native Ayo Dosunmu. The team announced Sunday morning the fourth-year player and former University of Illinois star will undergo left shoulder surgery and will miss the rest of the season.
item.dc:creator: Michael Johnson, WGN 9

item.title: Trans athlete wins MVP of women's college basketball tournament after dominating Christian rival in title game
item.description: A women's college basketball championship game in Canada saw a trans player score 21 points and win conference tournament MVP after a long feud between the two teams.
item.dc:creator: Fox News

item.title: Donato scores twice, Blackhawks snap 5-game skid with 6-3 road win over Ducks
item.description: ANAHEIM, Calif. (AP) — Ryan Donato had two goals and an assist, and the Blackhawks ended a five-game losing streak with a 6-3 road victory over the Anaheim Ducks on Saturday night. Teuvo Teravainen had a goal and two assists and Lukas Reichel, Wyatt Kaiser and Patrick Marron also scored.
item.dc:creator: Associated Press, WGN 9

item.title: BYU wins sixth straight, cruising past West Virginia
item.description: PROVO, Utah (ABC4 Sports) - Fousseyni Traore recorded the 21st double-double of his career on Saturday evening as No. 25 BYU defeated West Virginia 77-56 in front of a sold-out Marriott Center. “It was an ultimate tale of two halves," head coach Kevin Young said.
item.dc:creator: Dana Greene, ABC 4

item.title: Avalanche land Lindgren, Wild get Nyquist and Panthers acquire Seth Jones in busy day of NHL trades
item.description: Defensemen Seth Jones and Ryan Lindgren and forward Gustav Nyquist were on the move on Saturday as three Central Division teams got a jump on the NHL’s looming trade deadline.
item.dc:creator: STEPHEN WHYNO, Associated Press, KGET 17, NBC

item.title: Utes beat BYU on half-court overtime buzzer-beater
item.description: SALT LAKE CITY (ABC4 Sports) - The Utes women's basketball team ended the regular season with a bang. Matyson Wilke hit a half-court shot at the buzzer as the Utes avoided a major upset against BYU Saturday afternoon at the Huntsman Center, 76-73.
item.dc:creator: Dana Greene, ABC 4

item.title: Power struggles on 44th birthday as he begins IndyCar season seeking a Penske contract extension
item.description: Will Power had a rough 44th birthday Saturday when he lost power in his car, brushed the wall during practice and had his hybrid engine changed before qualifying for IndyCar’s season-opening race.
item.dc:creator: JENNA FRYER, Associated Press, Fox 5

item.title: School district bans trans athletes from girls' sports as state defies Trump, sparking loud pro-trans chants
item.description: The Tumwater School District in Washington voted Thursday to ban trans girls from playing for girls’ sports teams despite the state continuing to allow it.
item.dc:creator: Fox News

item.title: San Diego FC home opener: what to know before you go
item.description: San Diego FC (SDFC) is expected to make history this Saturday, March 1, as the club hosts its inaugural home opener at Snapdragon Stadium.
item.dc:creator: Amber Coakley, Fox 5

item.title: Girls Soccer: Bonita Vista 2, Torrey Pines 1
item.description: SAN DIEGO (KUSI)- CIF Girls Open Division semifinals Bonita Vista Barons on track to repeat if with a win playing at Torrey Pines on Wednesday night. Falcons lead 1-0, but then Bonita Vista scored on a penalty kick that Ava Gavlan ripped to the net to tie the match at 1.
item.dc:creator: Nick James, Fox 5
